---
title: "Food & Cooking"
toc: false
---

::: {.page-hero}
## Food Notes

Outside research, I enjoy documenting small food and cooking moments. This page keeps that side of the site lightweight while still matching the overall visual language of the homepage.
:::

## Matcha Cheese Cake

::: {.grid-two}
::: {.panel-card}
**Date:** November 26, 2025  
**Place:** Donostia-San Sebastian, Spain

A small food entry from San Sebastian. I am keeping this section simple: a short note, a few images, and room to expand later if I want the site to include more personal material.
:::

::: {.panel-card}
![](/food/image/tarta_de_queso_1.jpg){.img-fluid .gallery-image}

![](/food/image/tarta_de_queso_2.jpg){.img-fluid .gallery-image}
:::
:::
